roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/X COURT GRANTS PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DISMISS COUNTS1 & 2 PURSUANT TO PC 1385FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:  UNABLE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF,/OR/BE/CONTD:TO SET IN DEPT 17 ON COUNTS 3 & 4/DOP/

/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/TN: ABEL DEL CARPIO/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICEDECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:SUSAN KAPLAN/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/987,2/SAORD/SA1: CRYSTAL PESTANA, STACY GOMEZ,DANIEL MOSQUEDA, TATIANA CARVALHO, ZANDRA GUITEN/SAORD2/SAORD3/CTORD: THEPEOPLE TO PROVIDE THE DEFENSE NON-REDACTED COPIES OF POLICE REPORTS/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
